rationale: Issue split + Improvement from DRIVERS-1815; proactive spec-rollout work, driver wasn't doing anything wrong.
Test tooling improvement; replacing a DNS mock hack with async-container library, no spec behavior involved.
Adding debug-level logging for DNS seed list query; UX improvement, no spec rule violated.
Segfault in bson C extension next_object_id; native crash, not a BSON spec deviation.
Issue split + Improvement from DRIVERS-1541; proactive spec-rollout work adding KMS retry behavior.
Onboarding to Papertrail release tracking service; build/release pipeline, no spec involvement.
Dangling symlink in gem package for OCSP test support files; packaging issue, no spec behavior.
Race condition in CredentialCache missing mutex; implementation threading bug, no SCRAM spec rule violated.
Partial writes dropped when timeout present; implementation bug in network I/O, no spec rule cited.
GCC 15 compilation failure due to missing stdbool.h include; build/toolchain issue, no spec behavior.
Pipe file descriptors not closed when connection closes; resource leak implementation bug, no spec rule.
Ticket cites possible OCSP spec non-compliance with Google certs; resolved as Fixed, confirming noncompliance.
SDAM spec requires marking server Unknown cleanly; driver raises ArgumentError during this state transition.
Issue split + Improvement from DRIVERS-2822; proactive CRUD spec-rollout adding sort option to update.
Ticket explicitly states 'violates the retryable reads specification'; SocketError during checkout not retried since 2022.
CSFLE decryption returns BSON::Int64 instead of Ruby Integer; Ruby-specific type mapping ergonomics, not a spec rule.
TruffleRuby not differentiated in client metadata; missing platform detection, Improvement type not a spec violation.
Polling SRV records spec requires srvMaxHosts honored during monitoring; RUBY-2746 implemented it incompletely.
srvMaxHosts not applied via client options and ignored in SRV cluster monitoring; DNS seedlist spec requires it honored.
Memory leak in cursor reaper when batch_size < limit; resource management implementation bug, no spec rule.
insert_many inside with_transaction raises 'Cannot override timeout_ms'; CSOT+transactions spec should permit this.
Issue split + Improvement from DRIVERS-3411; proactive spec-rollout for transaction state preservation across retries.
Rubocop linting tool update to remove deprecation warnings; tooling maintenance, no spec involvement.
Issue split + Improvement from DRIVERS-3428; AGENTS.md documentation standardization across repos.
Issue split from DRIVERS-3394; clarifying phase description in network timeouts spec test file.
Depends on DRIVERS-421 for details; thin description, cannot confirm a specific spec rule violated.
insert_many fails for commands >16MB; CRUD spec requires batching at maxBsonObjectSize/maxWriteBatchSize limits.
Fixing driver tests for listIndexes output changes in MongoDB 4.3; CI test maintenance, not a spec violation.
Switching error handling library from error-chain to err-derive; internal dependency refactor, no behavior change.
Changing pool references from strong to weak; architectural refactor to avoid unwanted pool lifetime extension.
CMAP spec tests fail regularly and need stability fixes; test infrastructure issue, not driver behavior bug.
Removing dead code annotations and changing to #[cfg(test)]; internal code cleanup, no behavior change.
count_documents is required by CRUD spec; described as 'last remaining piece of the CRUD API' not yet implemented.
Moving tests into package for shared failpoint lock; test organization refactor, no spec behavior change.
Adding intra-documentation links in code comments; documentation improvement only, no spec behavior.
Cursors spec requires killCursors when cursor is exhausted/dropped; Rust driver missing Drop implementation.
minHeartbeatFrequencyMS is an SDAM spec-required option; driver filed as Bug for missing this implementation.
Driver prefers IPv6 on Windows when MongoDB doesn't listen there; platform-specific connectivity issue, no spec rule.
Porting insertMany batching; empty description but CRUD spec requires batching large inserts over 16MB limit.
Making command monitoring event creation lazy for performance; optimization with no observable behavior change.
Using buffered I/O with streams via bufstream crate for performance; no spec behavior change.
find_one_and_update fails because update parameter not passed to findAndModify command; clear CRUD spec violation.
Issue split + Improvement from DRIVERS-2421; improving server selection error messages, proactive rollout work.
SDAM spec MUST: replace server description with Unknown on handshake network error; driver not implementing this.
ssl_ca_certs option triggers invalid option warning; resolved as Done not Fixed, likely working as designed.
FindOneOptions missing Sort option present in FindOptions; CRUD spec requires sort be available for find operations.
trust-dns-proto version conflict with actix dependency; packaging/dependency issue, no spec behavior involved.
'update it to establish new connections as the SDAM spec describes'; monitoring threads reuse connection after errors.
Renaming ErrorKind::DnsName to ErrorKind::InvalidDnsName; API naming refactor, no spec behavior change.
WriteFailure Display implementation left empty/unimplemented; internal API skeleton cleanup, no spec behavior.
